name: Reflex Plus Adult Cat Food Aluminium Tray - Beef &game Chunks in Jelly 100g-PACK OF 16

tags.name: Bulk Cat Food & Bulk Dog Food

shortDescription: Full-balanced, beef & game protein-containing canned (wet) cat food carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds.
description: Reflex Plus Beef & Game Chunks in Jelly Adult Cat Food in Aluminium Tray (pack of 16) fully balanced, beef and game protein-containing cat food carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 8.0 Crude Oils & Fats (%) - 5.0 Crude Fiber (%) -0.3 Moisture (%) -82 Crude Ash (%) - 2.0 Vitamin D3 - 250 IE/kg Vitamin E - 15 mg/kg Copper -1.0 mg/kg Biotin - 20g/kg Manganese -1 mg/kg Zinc - 15 mg/kg Taurine - 445 mg/kg INGREDIENTS: Meat & Animal Derivatives (beef 5% min., game 4% min.), Minerals, Inulin (0.1%). FEEDING RECOMMENDATION: One alu-tray per meal. An adult cat (approx. 4kg) requires up to 3 meals per day. Individual requirements depend on factors like age, breed and activity. Serve at room temperature. Store in a cool, dry place. Not fit for human consumption.
